claim: NDC Conferences index lists the 2026 schedule across cities (Copenhagen, Oslo, AI, TechTown, Porto, London).
quote: NDC Sydney 22-24 April; NDC Toronto 5-8 May; NDC Copenhagen 1-4 June; NDC AI 8-10 June; NDC Oslo 14-18 September; NDC TechTown 21-24 September; NDC London 25-29 January 2027.

claim: NDC Copenhagen 2026 ticket prices in DKK with VAT exclusive.
quote: All Access Pass: 15,900 DKK; Workshop Pass (2 days): 10,900 DKK; 2-Day Conference Pass: 9,900 DKK; 1-Day Pass: 5,900 DKK. All plus 25% VAT.

claim: NDC Oslo 2026 ticket prices in NOK with early-bird ending May 22.
quote: Early Bird All Access Pass: 22,490 NOK; Regular All Access Pass: 25,990 NOK. 25% MVA (VAT/TAX) added.

claim: NDC Oslo 2026 runs 14-18 September at Oslo Spektrum with 150 speakers booking.
quote: 14-18 September 2026, Oslo Spektrum. 150 speakers being booked.

claim: NDC Copenhagen 2026 runs 1-4 June at Øksnehallen, near Copenhagen Central Station.
quote: Held at Øksnehallen, Copenhagen, from 1-4 June. The venue is a short walk from Copenhagen Central Station.

claim: NDC Porto's 2025 edition ran 20-24 October at Alfândega Porto Congress Centre; the 2026 dates are not yet announced on the site.
quote: NDC Porto 2025 Dates: October 20-24, 2025. Location: Alfândega Porto Congress Centre. No information about a 2026 edition appears on this webpage.

claim: NDC AI 2026 in Oslo runs 8-10 June as a 3-day AI event for software developers.
quote: NDC AI 2026 - Oslo | A 3-Day AI Event for Software Developers, June 8-10, 2026.

claim: NDC Security Oslo 2026 ran 2-5 March as a security-focused NDC track.
quote: NDC Security 2026 | Security Conference for Software Developers, 2-5 March 2026.

claim: NDC TechTown 2026 runs 21-24 September focused on embedded and systems programming.
quote: NDC TechTown 2026 | Software Conference for Embedded and Systems Programming, 21-24 September 2026.

claim: NDC London 2026 took place in late January at the Queen Elizabeth II Centre; NDC London 2027 runs 25-29 January 2027.
quote: 25-29 January 2027, Queen Elizabeth II Centre, Westminster. 100 Speakers (Currently booking). Pictures and Videos from NDC London 2026 referenced.

claim: Techorama Belgium 2026 (Medieval Edition) runs 11-13 May at Kinepolis Antwerpen with ~150 sessions and 10 hands-on workshops.
quote: Techorama 2026 - Medieval Edition. 11-13 May 2026, Kinepolis Antwerpen. ~150 sessions, 10 hands-on workshops.

claim: Techorama Belgium 2026 ticket tiers: Workshop €699, Knight (2-day conference) €899, Combi (3-day) €1,399.
quote: Workshop €699; Knight €899 (Most Popular); Combi €1,399 (Best Value). Early-bird until 28 February 2026; late-bird from 6 April 2026.

claim: Techorama Netherlands 2026 runs 26-28 October at Kinepolis Jaarbeurs Utrecht (Medieval Edition).
quote: Techorama 2026 NL: 26-28 October 2026, Kinepolis Jaarbeurs Utrecht. Day 1 workshops; Days 2-3 breakout sessions.

claim: Update Conference Prague 2026 runs 12-13 November at Clarion Congress Hotel Prague with 4 parallel tracks, 40+ sessions, ~65 speakers.
quote: 12-13 November 2026, Clarion Congress Hotel Prague. Four parallel tracks, 40+ technical sessions, approximately 65 speakers. Topics: .NET, Cloud, Security, AI, Blazor, Development.

claim: .NET DeveloperDays 2026 Warsaw runs 19-23 October at EXPO XXI; main conference 20-21 October with workshops on either side.
quote: October 19-23, 2026, EXPO XXI Center, Prądzyńskiego 12/14 Street, Warsaw. Main conference Tuesday 20 - Wednesday 21 October (in-person and virtual). Pre/post-conference training Mon 19 and Thu 22 - Fri 23.

claim: Build Stuff 2026 runs 2-4 December at Radisson Blu Hotel Lietuva, Vilnius; VIP 3-day onsite €650-€1,090 depending on tier.
quote: December 2-4, 2026, Radisson Blu Hotel Lietuva, Vilnius. VIP 3-Day Onsite: Pre-Early Bird €650; Early Bird €770; Late Bird €870; Regular €950; Late Saver €990; Last Minute €1,090. 1-Day Onsite €350-€580. The #1 Software Development Conference in the Baltics.

claim: DevSum 2026 runs 2-3 June in Stockholm with workshops 1 June; 70+ speakers focused on .NET, JS, Azure, web.
quote: DevSum 2026: June 2-3 in Stockholm with pre-conference workshops on June 1st. 70+ international speakers. Main audience: developers and architects with experience in .NET, JavaScript, Azure and web development.

claim: BASTA! Spring 2026 ran 2-6 March at The Westin Grand Frankfurt with 70+ sessions and keynotes.
quote: BASTA! Spring is a conference for .NET, Web & AI Innovation scheduled for March 2 – 6, 2026 in Frankfurt am Main. The Westin Grand Frankfurt. More than 70 sessions and keynotes.

claim: BASTA! Herbst 2026 runs 29 September - 2 October 2026 in Mainz (Rheingoldhalle).
quote: BASTA! Herbst 2026: 29 September – 2 October 2026, Rheingoldhalle Mainz.

claim: CloudBrew 2026 runs 10-11 December at Lamot, Mechelen, organized by AZUG (Belgian Microsoft Azure User Group).
quote: Thursday, December 10, 2026 - Friday, December 11, 2026. Lamot, Van Beethovenstraat 8-10, 2800 Mechelen, Belgium. Organized by AZUG.

claim: DDD Europe 2026 runs 8-12 June in Antwerp (workshops 8-10, conference 10-12); content is technology-agnostic.
quote: June 10-12, 2026 in Antwerp, Belgium, with workshops on June 8-9-10. Two dedicated tracks: Foundations and EventCentric. Conference prefers talks that are not technology-specific.

claim: Devoxx Belgium 2026 runs 5-9 October at Kinepolis Antwerp; conference ticket €695, deep-dive €445.
quote: Devoxx Belgium 2026: 5-9 October, Kinepolis Antwerp. Conference ticket (3 days, 7-9 Oct.) €695; Deep-Dive ticket (2 days, 5-6 Oct.) €445.

claim: Voxxed Days Luxembourg 2026 runs 18-19 June at Casino 2000, Mondorf-les-Bains; €249 early bird / €269 standard.
quote: June 18-19, 2026, Casino 2000, Rue Th. Flammang, L-5618 Mondorf-les-Bains. Early Bird €249; Standard €269. No dedicated C#/.NET track.

claim: Voxxed Days Amsterdam 2026 ran 1-2 April at Pathé Amsterdam (North).
quote: Voxxed Days Amsterdam 2026: April 1–2, 2026 in Amsterdam. Pathé Amsterdam (North).

claim: .NET Conf is Microsoft's free virtual annual event; 2025 edition ran 11-13 November and celebrated .NET 10 / Visual Studio 2026.
quote: .NET Conf is a free virtual event running November 11-13, 2025. 15th online conference for .NET Conf, 100k+ live viewers, hundreds of local watch-party events worldwide. Celebrates .NET 10 and Visual Studio 2026.

claim: Industry roundup notes Techorama grew to 1,500+ attendees and 150 sessions across 11 tracks; Build Stuff is a large .NET conference in Lithuania.
quote: Techorama has grown to more than 1,500 attendees and 150 sessions spread across 11 tracks. Build Stuff is a large .NET conference in Lithuania that has been gaining traction in recent years.

claim: Curated 'best .NET conferences' list maintained by community member Eduard Sizov is a reference index for European .NET events.
quote: The best .NET conferences 2026 — curated guide for .NET developers planning conference attendance.

claim: dev.events tracks .NET conferences in Europe with a sortable 2026/2027 listing covering NDC, Techorama, Update, BASTA, DeveloperDays.
quote: .NET conferences in Europe 2026 / 2027 — directory listing of upcoming events.

claim: NDC TechTown 2026 CFP is open with deadline 3 May 2026.
quote: Call for Papers — NDC TechTown 2026, Kongsberg, 21-24 September. Submission deadline: 3 May 2026.

claim: .NET DeveloperDays 2026 Sessionize CFP is open with deadline 10 May 2026.
quote: .NET DeveloperDays 2026, Warsaw 19-23 October. Call for speakers closes 10 May 2026.

claim: Techorama Netherlands 2026 Sessionize CFP closes 29 May 2026.
quote: Techorama 2026 Netherlands — Call for speakers ends 29 May 2026.

claim: DDC .NET Developer Conference '26 Sessionize CFP closes 15 June 2026.
quote: .NET Developer Conference '26, Cologne 23-26 November. Call for speakers ends 15 June 2026.

claim: Azure Summit (online, German) Sessionize CFP closes 15 June 2026.
quote: Azure Summit 24./25. November 2026 — Call for speakers ends 15 June 2026.

claim: M365 Summit Mainz Sessionize CFP closes 30 August 2026.
quote: M365 Summit Mainz 12.-14. Oktober 2026 — Call for speakers ends 30 August 2026.

claim: NDC Oslo 2026 CFP closed on 19 April 2026 per cfp.watch listing.
quote: NDC Oslo 2026, deadline 19 April 2026 — closed.

claim: NDC London 2027 CFP closed on 7 September 2025.
quote: Call for Papers for NDC London 25-29 January 2027 closed 7 September 2025.

claim: DevSum Stockholm 2026 CFP closed on 8 December 2025.
